title: platanthera zeyheri
intro: Platanthera zeyheri, also known as the Zeyher's orchid or Zeyher's pincer orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues, thanks to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Platanthera zeyheri include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function, making it a potential treatment for conditions like bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Platanthera zeyheri typically involve drying the plant's roots and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
